prompt:
Use case: illustration-story
Asset type: README promo illustration for an AI news briefing skill
Primary request: Generate one standalone 16:9 horizontal Chinese article illustration in Xiaohei Scenes 2.0 style.
Scene/backdrop: seamless pure #FFFFFF white background, clean pure-white studio surface, very light contact shadows only
Subject: scattered news from many sources being gathered into one structured briefing
Style/medium: real photographed objects naturally integrated with hand-drawn Xiaohei, premium restrained weird clear, not PPT, not infographic
Composition/framing: medium-light scene footprint, airy spacing, not close-up, not miniature
Lighting/mood: soft studio light, calm but urgent
Color palette: black, white, sparse cobalt blue, soft pink, lemon yellow, tiny green, tiny tomato red accents
Materials/textures: real paper slips, a transparent acrylic document tray or slim white folder, light binder clip, real object studio realism
Text (verbatim): "热点太散" "收成一份" "可直接发"
Constraints: Use /Users/Bing/.hermes/skills/ian-xiaohei-scenes/assets/examples/02-message-overload.png as a quality anchor, not a layout to copy. Preserve only these invariants: large white space, one source object behaving like an output portal, Xiaohei performing the core blocking/organizing action, sparse handwritten Chinese labels, realistic object lighting. Required mutations: replace the black phone with a transparent acrylic inbox tray or slim white briefing folder; change the direction so slips come from both upper-left and upper-right into the tray instead of spilling from one left object; make Xiaohei kneel and push/stack retained slips into the tray rather than holding a shield; remove the hourglass and use only one tiny binder clip as the sole prop; move labels around the incoming slips and tray rather than around a phone. The conflict must be readable in 3 seconds: too many scattered headlines are finally being gathered into one sendable briefing. One core physical action only. One real main object or compact object group only. At most one small prop. At most three handwritten Chinese labels. No UI screenshot, no app logo, no phone chat interface, no pasted collage, no office room background, no grey background, no gradient, no long explanation, no title, no concept inventory, no direct remake of the selected master.

Use case: illustration-story
Asset type: README promo illustration for an AI news briefing skill
Primary request: Generate one standalone 16:9 horizontal Chinese article illustration in Xiaohei Scenes 2.0 style.
Scene/backdrop: seamless pure #FFFFFF white background, clean pure-white studio surface, very light contact shadows only
Subject: the workflow stays standalone-first even when external helpers try to relabel or pull it away
Style/medium: real photographed objects naturally integrated with hand-drawn Xiaohei, premium restrained weird clear
Composition/framing: medium-light horizontal scene, airy spacing, one dominant identity object with one relabeling force
Lighting/mood: soft studio light, firm resistance, productized clarity
Color palette: black and white with small blue, yellow, pink, green accents
Materials/textures: real lanyard card holder, matte white label maker or correction tape style relabeling tool, subtle tape accents
Text (verbatim): "主流程在这" "可选增强" "别外包"
Constraints: Use /Users/Bing/.hermes/skills/ian-xiaohei-scenes/assets/examples/05-ai-automation-badge.png as a quality anchor, not a layout to copy. Preserve only these invariants: horizontal identity object under relabeling pressure, Xiaohei physically resisting the label change, sparse labels, large white space, realistic object texture. Required mutations: replace the work badge theme with a transparent product card labeled standalone-first on a clean white strip; make the pulling force come from a small label-maker or tagging gun positioned higher and farther right, not from the same tape dispenser relationship; make Xiaohei brace against the card frame with both feet and pull the lower corner instead of tugging a neck strap from far left; change the lanyard angle into a diagonal anchor line crossing behind the card; place labels as open-space annotations instead of mirroring the original positions. The conflict must be readable in 3 seconds: optional tools can help, but the owned workflow must stay in this skill. One core physical action only. One real main object or compact object group only. At most one small prop. At most three handwritten Chinese labels. No AI ad aesthetic, no robot, no UI, no company names, no infographic, no direct remake of the master.

Use case: illustration-story
Asset type: README promo illustration for an AI news briefing skill
Primary request: Generate one standalone 16:9 horizontal Chinese article illustration in Xiaohei Scenes 2.0 style.
Scene/backdrop: seamless pure #FFFFFF white background, clean pure-white studio surface, very light contact shadows only
Subject: weak evidence stories are filtered away while retained items enter the final digest
Style/medium: real photographed objects naturally integrated with hand-drawn Xiaohei, premium restrained weird clear
Composition/framing: one filtering tool and one receiving stack, readable in one glance, lots of air
Lighting/mood: soft studio light, editorial, precise
Color palette: black and white with sparse blue, yellow, pink, green accents
Materials/textures: real metal tea strainer or small filter, retained news cards, a neat small stack or tray for verified items, one paper clip optional
Text (verbatim): "先验真" "正式保留" "继续跟踪"
Constraints: Use /Users/Bing/.hermes/skills/ian-xiaohei-scenes/assets/examples/06-ai-resume-filter.png as a quality anchor, not a layout to copy. Preserve only these invariants: one real filtering tool as the main object, Xiaohei physically touching the filtered cards, sparse handwritten labels, lots of white space, realistic object shadows. Required mutations: replace resume screening with news verification; angle the metal filter downward toward a small clean tray or short verified stack on the right instead of a central sieve over a paper pile; make Xiaohei stand on the right side catching one verified card coming through rather than pushing from below; add one faint dropped low-confidence slip beneath the filter edge to imply follow-up, without clutter; move the main explanatory label close to the receiving tray instead of above a sieve. The conflict must be readable in 3 seconds: not every headline goes into the digest; only verified, valuable items stay. One core physical action only. One real main object or compact object group only. At most one small prop. At most three handwritten Chinese labels. No resume UI, no hiring metaphor text, no process chart, no direct remake of the master, no overloaded paper pile.
